entradas.original: {\fad(475,0)\blur1.5\i0\pos(985,327)\c&H181FA9&}MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM{\i1}
{\fad(0,399)\fs100\pos(1060,600)\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&}(PART 1)
{\fad(0,399)\fs120\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&\pos(600,600)}THE SHUDDERING \NMOUNTAIN
{\i1}This is formation 386.
{\i1}Course ahead is all green.\NProceeding with operation.{\i}
{\i1}Don't get shot down by any cyclopes!
{\i1}Same goes for you!{\i}
Tunnel entrance confirmed!\NCoordinates are—
{\i1}Transmitting coordinates now!{\i0}
{\i1}That idiot! He's left himself wide open!{\i}
Damned flatlanders!
Even Feddies born in the colonies\Nbecome victims of gravity!
They have our coordinates!\NPull back to the tunnel!
{\i1}They'll be hitting us with cannon fire next!{\i}
Got it!\NEledore, we have the coordinates!
Michel, this is incredible! Check it out!
Transferring data to Guntank team.
entradas.traduzido: "Dados sendo transferidos para a equipe do Guntank."

entradas.original: Would you look at all those guys out there...
entradas.traduzido: Olhe para todos aqueles caras lá fora...

entradas.original: They've reshaped the whole mountain!
We're starting!
Yes!
Usual procedure.\NTen shots and then we move.
entradas.traduzido: Procedimento habitual. \NDez tiros e então avançamos.

entradas.original: Gotcha. Let's do it.
Direct hits? Not bad...
Will we be able to hold them off\Nwith the forces we have?
Don't worry.\NThe Apsaras will be finished soon.
entradas.traduzido: Não se preocupe. \NOs Apsaras estarão prontos em breve.

entradas.original: And we're proceeding with the\Npreparations for the Kergeren's escape.
It was Miss Aina's idea.
We're going back to Side 3!
{\i1}Abandoning a base...
{\i1}The final proof of a soldier's incompetence.
{\i1}Preparations to blow the\Ntunnel entrance are complete!
{\i1}We've blown the shutters...
{\i1}...and are now sending Kojima\Nbattalion's 07th Team into the tunnel.{\i}
Do we have video?
Yes, Sir.
Switching to hard line.
{\i1}No sign of the enemy.
{\i1}We're practically drowning in\NMinovsky particles over here!
{\i1}Cut the chatter!{\i0}
{\i1}Right, right ..{\i0}
Explosives discovered!\NProceeding with disarmament!
This is our fourth penetration.\NPlease let this be the one...
Let's pull the GMs back until\Nthe bombs are disarmed.
We've already lost nine units!
Only six were destroyed, sir.
I don't care what the number is!
entradas.traduzido: Não me importo com qual é o número!

entradas.original: Commander...
I placed my trust in you.
If we can't find a way in...
...what would you say to our making\Nthe mountain disappear?
But, without using nuclear weapons,\Nthat won't be a simple task.
entradas.traduzido: "Mas sem usar armas nucleares, \Nisso não será uma tarefa simples."

entradas.original: We've got a high probability of a\Nmobile suit reactor explosion!
{\i1}Lock filters onto all optical sensors,\Nor you'll burn them out!{\i}
{\i1}All units, brace for shock wave!
Secure from alert. Looks like\Nnothing's going to blow.
entradas.traduzido: "Seguro de alerta. Parece que \Nnão vai acontecer nada."

entradas.original: As long as mobile suits are\Npowered by nuclear reactors,
entradas.traduzido: Enquanto os móveis são \Nalimentados por reatores nucleares,

entradas.original: there's no way to completely avoid\Nbattlefield accidents, correct?
A-Are you suggesting we\Nintentionally blow up one of our...?!
Operation Star One is near.
At all costs, I want to avoid\NGeneral Revil laughing at me...
...for allowing that thing to get\Nup into space. Understand?
That's for coming out...
There's still one left!
{\i1}Karen! One of the skirted ones, and it's fast!{\i}
{\i1}Leave him to me.
Above me?!
Any way I shoot, I'll still hit his reactor!
entradas.traduzido: "De qualquer jeito que eu atire, eu ainda acertarei o reator dele!"

entradas.original: {\i1}You okay, GM Head?
Thanks... But could you stop\Ncalling me "GM Head"?
{\i1}Propellant loading now 70% complete.\NContinuing countdown.{\i}
You were right!\NIt's getting ready to leave.
entradas.traduzido: Você estava certa! \NEstá se preparando para sair.

entradas.original: {\i1}Our suppression forces in the\Nmining town still haven't reported in.{\i}
Have they failed to secure an\Nescape route for the Kergeren?
I'm going out. Reload my weaponry!
Well, sir... This is the last of our ammunition.
entradas.traduzido: Bem, senhor... Isso é a ultima munição que nos resta.

entradas.original: I want to grant Miss Aina's request, but...!
entradas.traduzido: Quero atender ao pedido da Sra. Aina, mas...!

entradas.original: Anyone who isn't busy,\Nplease get aboard the Kergeren!
entradas.traduzido: Quem não está ocupado, \Npor favor, entre a bordo do Kergeren!

entradas.original: Move the wounded into the gravity block.
entradas.traduzido: Mova os feridos para o bloco de gravidade.

entradas.original: If you can't get a seat, put on a normal\Nsuit and move into the cargo bay!
You, in the mobile suit, please help\Nget the wounded on board.
{\i1}What, we in the base\Ndefense team, too?!
{\i1}Did Rear Admiral Ginius order that?
This has nothing to do with my brother!
entradas.traduzido: Isto não tem nada a ver com o meu irmão!

entradas.original: It's a personal request from me!
You lose. Help them.
Norris! You're all right!
So, you finally got Master\NGinius to see your point.
I can't let these soldiers die\Nfor my brother's delusions.
You've gotten stronger...\NIs it because you're in love?
entradas.traduzido: "Você ficou mais forte... \NPorque você está apaixonada?"

entradas.original: I'm disappointed. I was born\Nwith feelings, too, you know.
entradas.traduzido: Estou desapontada. Eu nasci \Ncom sentimentos também, sabe.

entradas.original: At least I had them until I chose\Nto be a professional soldier...
I think of you like a father, Norris,\Nyet I know so little about you.
Me?! You think of me as a father?!
entradas.traduzido: Eu?! Você pensa em mim como um pai?

entradas.original: I'm honored!
That decides it! I'm going back out.
entradas.traduzido: "Isso decide tudo! Estou voltando para fora."

entradas.original: You can't! If you leave now,\Nyou won't be able to go with us!
entradas.traduzido: Você não pode! Se você sair agora, \N você não poderá ir conosco!

entradas.original: Doesn't matter. A person's life is\Nabout what they've accomplished.
Master Ginius has made his dream\Ncome true, and that's commendable.
entradas.traduzido: Mestre Ginius tornou seu sonho \Nrealidade, e isso é louvável.

entradas.original: If your wish is for the\NKergeren to escape,
then it is my duty as a soldier\Nto help you accomplish that.
Now, watch as I secure\Nan escape route for you.
Don't die...!
Niever!
I can't stop him...!
If anything happens to Norris, then...!
Good luck, sir!
...then I'm the one who killed him!
entradas.traduzido: "Eu sou a responsável pela sua morte!"

entradas.original: And when that happens...\NI won't let him go alone!
entradas.traduzido: E quando isso acontecer... \NEu não vou deixá-lo ir sozinho!

entradas.original: I never thought Miss Aina\Nwould so resemble her father.
entradas.traduzido: Nunca pensei que a senhorita Aina\N seria tão parecida com seu pai.

entradas.original: {\i1}Sanders here. I'm in position.{\i0}
{\i1}Karen here. In position.
{\i1}All units, prep for cannon fire!{\i0}
{\i1}We'll stand by till we get\Norders from the main force.
{\i1}Let's grab some chow.
Roger. What do you want to eat?
entradas.traduzido: Roger. O que você quer comer?

entradas.original: Shut up!
It's your turn to make the food!
entradas.traduzido: É a sua vez de fazer a comida!

entradas.original: I've heard this sound before...
Commander, better save the chow for later.
entradas.traduzido: Melhor economizar a ração para depois.

entradas.original: {\i1}Something's coming.{\i}
From where?!
Dammit! The sound keeps moving around!
An elevator... It's coming from underground!
entradas.traduzido: Um elevador... Ele está vindo do subsolo!

entradas.original: {\i1}Sanders, front-left of you!
It's fast!
One command truck, three human-types.
entradas.traduzido: Um caminhão de comando, três tipos humanos.

entradas.original: Three tanks, one directly below.
Just one unit? Sheesh... We're insulted.
entradas.traduzido: Apenas uma unidade? Puxa... Estamos ofendidos.

entradas.original: {\i1}He's so close, he's in my blind spot!\NTake him, Karen!
So, those human-types\Nhave beam weapons, too!
entradas.traduzido: "Então, aqueles tipos de seres humanos \Ntambém têm armas de feixe!"

entradas.original: That slowpoke Kergeren will\Nbe easy pickings for them!
Gotcha!
{\i1}Damn! He's in that open-shaft building!{\i}
{\i1}Leave him to me!
I can guess where he is if he's falling...
entradas.traduzido: Se ele está caindo, eu posso adivinhar onde ele está...

entradas.original: There!
{\i1}Did you get him?
One!
He's just playing with Sanders and me!
entradas.traduzido: Ele só está brincando com o Sanders e eu!

entradas.original: He's already taken a tank out...\NThis guy's an ace!
entradas.traduzido: "Ele ja tirou um tanque do caminho... \NEsse cara e um as!"

entradas.original: I appreciate you giving me\Nan escape route! Thanks!
My field of vision sucks... Eledore!
Yeah?
{\i1}Take command.
You want me to {\i1}what{\i0}?!
I can't follow his movements from here!
entradas.traduzido: Não consigo acompanhar seus movimentos daqui!

entradas.original: {\i1}I need to depend on your ears!{\i}
All right! Leave it to me!
08th Team, you are now under my command!
God help us...
You say something?
No, not a thing, sir!
{\i1}Sanders!
{\i1}Yeah?
{\i1}Nothing personal, but if you don't take\Na different approach, you'll be killed!
{\i1}This guy's better than us!{\i0}
Oh? At last, the real battle begins...
entradas.traduzido: Ei? Finalmente, a verdadeira batalha começa...

entradas.original: Trying to stir up more smoke, huh?!
He's headed for you!
{\i1}Tell me something I don't know!
{\i1}Dammit..
Where's he coming from?
{\i1}You son of a bitch!
Not there...?!
Oh, hell!
He's going for the cockpit!
entradas.traduzido: Ele está indo para a cabine de pilotagem!

entradas.original: {\i1}I've got him, Master Chief!{\i}
Gotcha! Overhead, 649 by 23!
{\i1}Unit 301, fire!!!
Just one left...
Apsaras final check routines, now running.
entradas.traduzido: Agora, após a verificação final das rotinas, estão em execução.

entradas.original: All green. The Apsaras is complete.
entradas.traduzido: Tudo verde. O Apsara está completo.

entradas.original: It's been a long, hard road.
entradas.traduzido: Foi um caminho longo e duro.

entradas.original: I thank you.
Cheers!
Excuse me.
Please, enjoy your drinks.
{\i1}Thanks, Eledore!
Come on...!
Yes, be afraid! Shrink back!
Die knowing you couldn't use your\Nmobile suit to its full power!
entradas.traduzido: "Sabendo que você não poderia usar seu \Nmobile suit com todo o poder!"

entradas.original: If I play this defensively, I lose.\NGotta attack!
You're making this fun for me!
Time for some payback!!!
{\i1}That certainly looked impressive,
{\i1}but the tank's about to be scrapped!
I have to make it!
{\i1}It's over!
Miss Aina!
I'm afraid I won't make that rendezvous...
...because I've found\Nwhere I'm going to die!
Miss Aina! We just sighted a\Nsignal flare from Captain Norris.
entradas.traduzido: Miss Aina! Nós acabamos de avistar um sinal de \Nfarol do Capitão Norris.

entradas.original: What color was it?! How is he?!
entradas.traduzido: Qual cor era?! Como ele está?!

entradas.original: It was red...
“Unable to return. Launch the Kergeren..."
Yes.
{\i1}Kergeren now ready for lift-off.
{\i1}Beginning to cut energy pipes to the base.
Gentlemen...
While it pains me to say goodbye\Nto you all, the time has come.
Relax and get some rest.
The Apsaras is mine alone!
The Kergeren takes off in 20 minutes.
It's time I started using a few tricks!
entradas.traduzido: É hora de eu começar a usar alguns truques!

entradas.original: Out of ammo?!
He just got my left arm!
Your reflexes are good,\Nbut that won't be enough for this!
Relying on your eyes is\Nyour fatal weakness!
Dammit! Where's the main circuit?!
He's coming?!
Why won't he shoot?!
Just finish me off already!!!
{\i1}Thanks, I owe you one.
{\i1}Shut up and go, already.
{\i1}Gotcha.{\i}
{\i1}So, what do we do now,\Nacting commander?
{\i1}If we could just get to the\Nweapons in the container...{\i}
Shut up! He'd kill him while we were trying!
Just defend that tank! No matter what!
entradas.traduzido: Defendam o tanque a qualquer custo!

entradas.original: It's time I stopped playing around.
entradas.traduzido: "É hora de eu parar de brincadeira."

entradas.original: What will you do?! The pilot's still alive!
entradas.traduzido: O que você vai fazer? O piloto ainda está vivo!

entradas.original: {\i1}Here he comes, Sanders!
{\i1}Right.
Dammit, hands, do what I want!
entradas.traduzido: "Maldição, as mãos, façam o que eu quero!"

entradas.original: My friends... Unit 301...!
Who am I to tell them to get back alive?!
entradas.traduzido: Quem sou eu para dizer a eles que voltem vivos?

entradas.original: Who cares about fighting for your friends?!
entradas.traduzido: Quem se importa em lutar pelos seus amigos?

entradas.original: All I know is I'm scared!
I want to live!!!
Oh? Are you awake now?
{\i1}I’m going to live!!!{\i}
{\i1}I'm going to live...
{\i1}...And marry Aina!!!
{\i1}You're {\i0}the one...?!
How careless of me!
The commander! He's lost it...!
Fools who stop wallowing in\Nself-pity really can be strong.
He's back!
That sound...
No time to celebrate, guys!
Aina's about to make a reappearance!
entradas.traduzido: Aina está prestes a aparecer novamente!

entradas.original: Now firing.
Excellent. Let it begin.
{\i1}What the hell...?!
So, I've met Miss Aina's lover.
entradas.traduzido: "Então eu conheci o amante da Sra. Aina."

entradas.original: Life can be funny, sometimes...
entradas.traduzido: A vida pode ser engraçada, às vezes...

entradas.original: {\i1}However... I won't lose!
I’ve won!!!
Oh, no...!
I've lost...
Listen, everyone. I'm leaving the service.
entradas.traduzido: Ouvam, todos. Estou saindo do serviço.

entradas.original: {\fs200\blur1\pos(720,650)\c&HDEDEE3&}NEXT EPISODE
{\i1}Karen...
{\i1}Sanders...
{\i1}Eledore...
{\i1}Michel...
{\i1}Don't die. We'll meet again.
{\i1}Next time,\NThe Shuddering Mountain (Part 2).
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Agarrar-se a ela agora! Não a deixe ir.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Agarrar-se a ela agora! Não a deixe ir.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Dez anos depois, daqui a uma década.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Dez anos depois, daqui a uma década.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\fs100\pos(1060,600)\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&}(PART 2)
{\fs120\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&\pos(600,600)}THE SHUDDERING \NMOUNTAIN
